macro.title: Congress has a chance to expand affordable homeownership. It shouldn’t waste it.
macro.what: Manufactured housing remains a major source of affordable, non-subsidized homeownership, but barriers persist
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: TitleEase integrates with Contract2Close platform
macro.what: The integration is designed to incorporate title ordering into existing workflows used by real estate professionals.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Monthly Payments Tick Up For First Time in 8 Months As Home Prices Hit Record High
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The Typical Luxury Home Costs 9 Times More Than the Typical Non Luxury Home in These South Florida ‘Wealth Magnet’ Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: San Diego to get more transit housing density as SB 79 row settles
housing.what: San Diego has spent recent years earning a reputation as one of California’s most aggressive housing builders, streamlining permits citywide
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: The Agency’s Zane Burnett: AI success starts with clean data, not hype
housing.what: The Agency's Zane Burnett sat down with HousingWire to explain why operational efficiency from AI comes before return on investment and more.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: The IDX debate: Is it time to do away with the Internet Data Exchange?
housing.what: If IDX ends, buyers may rely on portals for full inventory, large brokerages gain, and seller exposure may drop.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Most Homeowners See Their Home as a Reflection of Who They Are; Most Renters See It as Just a Place To Live
housing.what: In recognition of National Homeownership Month in June, we surveyed American homeowners about how their homes and neighborhoods make them feel
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Seller Choice Keeps Winning, Quietly
housing.what: CRMLS, the largest real estate listing service in the country, just gave home sellers a more flexible way to bring their home to the market before it is broadly launched across the internet
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: $95M funding, USLBM deal back Higharc AI push in homebuilding
notables.what: Artificial intelligence has reached homebuilding’s proving ground
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: ONE Sotheby’s International Realty adds sales director
notables.what: According to the brokerage, Figueroa has been involved in more than $3 billion in closed transactions during her career.
notables.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
notables.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: NAR tells members to report Realtor brand misuse
notables.what: NAR is updating its Trademark Protection Program and says AI tools help identify Realtor trademark misuse earlier for enforcement.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: NRMLA urges HUD to loosen FHA property rules
notables.what: NRMLA urges HUD to revise FHA property rules, citing shared wells, repair checks and second appraisals that raise HECM costs.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: UWM likely better off after losing Two Harbors deal, KBW says
notables.what: KBW says UWM avoids leverage risk after the Two Harbors loss, and a dividend cut could cut its debt-to-equity ratio from 3.1x to 2.2x by 2027.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
